title: Liquor scam: Chhattisgarh High Court grants bail to former CMO official Saumya Chaurasia
description: The Chhattisgarh High Court recently granted bail to suspended bureaucrat Saumya Chaurasia in the money laundering case linked to the liquor scam in the State. [Saumya Chaurasia vs Directorate of Enforcement].Chaurasia had served as Deputy Secretary to former Chief Minister Bhupesh Baghel.Justice Arvind Kumar Verma observed that Chaurasia had made out a case for bail on the ground of parity. It noted that her alleged role was peripheral compared to the principal conspirators who have already bee
